The bioactive constituents of Rotala illecebroides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Rotala illecebroides include teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate respiratory symptoms and support immune function.
